meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Passive Income for Students: Overcome Project Block (AI Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project ideas. Learn to build passive income AI apps using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led guide for student developers.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are looking for 'ideas' instead of 'problems.' Passive income stems from automating tedious tasks for specific niches. By using Antigravity to scaffold your infrastructure and Claude Code to iterate on business logic, you transform a simple script into a scalable, monetizable AI micro-SaaS asset.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the developer's greatest adversary. You have the technical skills, but the paralysis of 'what to build' keeps you trapped in tutorial hell, watching others scale while you polish a to-do list app that nobody needs. The reality is that the most successful projects aren't born from genius; they are born from identifying a bottleneck and applying an automated solution.

Today, we pivot. We aren't just writing code; we are building digital assets. Using the raw power of Antigravity and the agentic precision of Claude Code, we will construct a micro-service designed to solve a real-world friction point. This is your transition from a student writing code to an AI Builder creating recurring value.

steps.title: Identify a High-Value Niche
steps.description: Find a repetitive task in a specific professional community (e.g., real estate lead sorting or social media captioning) and define the input-output loop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current market for micro-SaaS tools in the legal-tech space. Identify three high-frequency, low-complexity tasks that can be solved via an LLM API wrapper.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research 'market gaps for AI micro-SaaS in 2024'

steps.title: Scaffold the Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a robust, production-ready boilerplate that includes authentication and database connectivity so you don't waste time on plumbing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a FastAPI boilerplate with Supabase integration and Stripe subscription handling. Include a modular directory structure for AI service handlers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'init project structure using fastAPI and supabase'

steps.title: Build the Core AI Logic
steps.description: Implement the core value proposition using Claude Code to handle prompt engineering and response parsing, ensuring high reliability for your users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer that takes user input, sanitizes it, sends it to Claude API with a system prompt optimized for data extraction, and returns a JSON response.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'implement prompt orchestration layer in src/services'

steps.title: Integrate Monetization
steps.description: Connect your application to Stripe to ensure that every successful run of your AI logic creates a potential revenue event.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a Stripe webhook handler that triggers on checkout.session.completed and updates the user's credit balance in the Supabase database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'stripe integration for usage-based billing'

steps.title: Deploy and Iterate
steps.description: Push your code to production and use automated logging to see where users get stuck, then use Claude Code to fix issues instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a deployment script for Vercel that includes environment variable management and a basic health check endpoint.

pro_tips: Always build for 'usage-based' pricing rather than 'flat-fee' to align your revenue with the value delivered.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests before you write the feature; it forces better architecture design.
Never build a UI until the backend logic successfully handles three real-world test cases.
Treat your code as a disposable asset; if it doesn't generate money in 30 days, pivot the prompt logic, not the framework.
Monitor API latency; if your AI response takes more than 3 seconds, your churn rate will skyrocket.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 20 minutes a day on 'distribution'—posting in the subreddits or Discord servers where your target users hang out. Iterate based on feedback, not assumptions.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the workflow of a professional AI builder. Stop dreaming about the perfect idea and start building the infrastructure that makes passive income a reality. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
